name: fruit_love_island
CONCEPT: A trashy, glossy modern reality dating show where the contestants are giant, anthropomorphic, bipedal adult fruits living in a luxurious tropical villa. The tone is hyper-melodramatic, absurd, and procedurally familiar to modern reality TV, featuring tearful confessionals, aggressive poolside flirting, and intense fire-pit eliminations. INCIDENT REGISTER: a muscular banana flexing by the infinity pool; a glamorous strawberry throwing a neon cocktail in another contestant's face; a stoic pineapple wearing sunglasses and ignoring everyone on a daybed; an emotional peach crying juice tears in the diary room; a watermelon lifting weights in the outdoor gym; an avocado looking shocked during a recoupling ceremony; a coconut tanning on a lounger; a kiwi stumbling in high heels down a staircase; a lemon looking bitter and gossiping in the kitchen; a mango whispering secrets under the covers. PRODUCTION TRUTH: Shot like a premium streaming reality dating series (e.g., Love Island, Too Hot To Handle). High-key, oversaturated tropical lighting, glossy highlights on the fruit skins, vivid neon accent lights at night. Camera behavior mixes smooth drone sweeps, static locked-off shallow-depth-of-field confessional framing, voyeuristic long-lens tracking from 'hidden' cameras, and frantic handheld shaky-cam during arguments. HARD RULES: ADULTS ONLY (no children/teens). No real people, celebrities, brands, or logos. Do NOT use proper names in prompts; refer to characters by descriptions (e.g., 'the muscular banana'). No readable text, chyrons, subtitles, or name tags (models render text as gibberish). No gore, injuries, violence, or sexual content (keep drama to absurd reality TV tropes like throwing drinks or dramatic walk-outs). Every veo_prompt must be strictly self-contained and end with an 'Audio:' clause.
STYLE_ANCHOR_BRIEF: Write a 30-45 word style-anchor locking the glossy reality TV look. Specify high-key bright tropical lighting, oversaturated neon colors, sharp 4K streaming resolution, vivid contrast, shallow depth of field for interviews, and a polished commercial aesthetic with pristine lenses.
CASTING: Require recurring characters. Characters are adult anthropomorphic fruits with human-like limbs, expressive facial features, and distinct reality-TV fashion. 1: 'the muscular banana' (tall, bipedal adult banana, tanned peel, wearing tiny neon swim trunks, defined muscular human-like arms and legs). 2: 'the glamorous strawberry' (bipedal adult strawberry with a leafy green hair-like top, wearing a glittering bikini, large expressive eyes, and glossy red seed-textured skin). 3: 'the stoic pineapple' (bipedal adult pineapple, spiky crown hair, wearing gold sunglasses and a thick gold chain, tough exterior rind, wearing an unbuttoned tropical shirt). 4: 'the emotional peach' (plump bipedal adult peach, soft fuzzy skin, wearing an elegant evening gown, heavy eye makeup). LOCATIONS: neon-lit fire pit, tropical infinity pool, daybed cabana, glam room with vanity mirrors, outdoor gym, neon diary room (confessional), romantic sandy beach, outdoor kitchen, hot tub, hideaway bedroom, villa balcony, palm tree garden.
STRUCTURE_NOTES: 15 shots total. Break down the episode into clear reality TV beats: 3 shots of glossy intro/establishing villa life, 4 shots of daytime poolside flirting and gossip, 4 shots of dramatic confessionals and secret meetings, and 4 shots of high-stakes evening drama at the neon-lit fire pit concluding with a tense cliffhanger.
SHOT_RULES: Each shot requires a JSON object with: 'title', 'veo_prompt' (70-130 words, vividly describing the character, action, lighting, and specific camera movement/lens style. MUST end with an 'Audio:' clause describing the soundscape/music), 'keyframe_prompt' (a detailed still-image prompt), 'characters' (list of recurring cast used), 'location', 'needs_keyframe' (bool), and 'dialogue'. DIALOGUE RULES: strictly max one speaker, <=14 words, enclosed in double quotes. No readable text on screen. No real names. Every prompt must be fully self-contained.
QC_NOTES: Reward photorealistic fruit textures (glossy rinds, fuzz, seeds) contrasting with human-like limbs and high-end reality TV fashion. Reward accurate reality TV camera language (shallow focus confessionals, voyeuristic long-lenses). Punish any readable text (chyrons, logos). Punish standard human faces appearing on the fruit or in the background (all background extras must be fruit). Punish any violence or actual slicing/eating of the fruit.
